reden.description: The best TMC platform - your one-stop destination for sharing Minecraft builds, exploring creative designs, and enhancing gameplay with cutting-edge redstone technology.

download_page.sorry_constructing: Sorry, our download page is under construction, we suggest you to download at

footer.mojang_disclaimer: NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT SERVICE. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG, NETEASE OR MICROSOFT.

community_intro.discord: Join our Discord server to chat with other redstone developers and get help from the community.
community_intro.open_source: Reden is an open-source project and free for everyone. We welcome everyone to contribute to Reden including code, documentation, wiki, and more.
community_intro.sponsor: Reden is sponsored by the community. We appreciate every sponsor who supports us.
community_intro.title: Community
community_intro.wiki: Reden Wiki contains almost everything you need to know about redstone ans Reden. It is also a great place to share your knowledge with the community.

feature_intro.debugger: Can't figure out why your redstone contraption isn't working? Reden Debugger can help you see how the game exactly processes your redstone contraption.
feature_intro.rvc: RVC (Reden Version Control) is a version control system designed for redstone. It allows you to manage your redstone projects in all versions with ease.
feature_intro.title: Features
feature_intro.undo: Made a mistake? Reden can quickly undo your actions by just pressing Ctrl+Z. All chain reactions will be undone.

intro_description.intro_1: The name Reden comes from Redstone Eden, meaning a paradise for redstone. We hope Reden can become a paradise for Minecraft redstone enthusiasts, providing players with rich redstone machines, configurations, tutorials and other resources. We are committed to building an open and friendly community, and welcome everyone to join us!
intro_description.intro_2: Reden was originally the name of my mod, and it's also the name of this community. Whether it's my mod or this community, it's all about making players enjoy the game better and create better. Reden carries the original intention of facilitating players through code and technology, and also guides our community towards a more open, inclusive, and high-tech direction.
intro_description.intro_3: From a dedicated website for generating world eaters and other machines, to the current redstone enthusiast community, Reden has been constantly developing. By February 2025, Reden has hundreds of redstone machines and tens of thousands of downloads, becoming a new force in the Minecraft redstone community. Reden has multiple innovative technologies under development or already online, including: better schematic preview functions, redstone machine output rate annotation functions, automated generation of redstone machines, online schematic editing technology, one-click download and use of machines based on in-game mods, etc.
intro_description.intro_4: Below is an introduction to the mod features and community components

sync_github.description: Bind GitHub Apps, sync machines, configurations, repositories and creators you follow: your world!
sync_github.title: GitHub Sync

sponsors.badge: You can get this Sponsor badge by supporting us, and it will be displayed on your profile.
sponsors.description: Reden is supported by you, and we are sincerely grateful to every sponsor.
sponsors.notice: Reden is an open-source project and always free for everyone. We receive no funding from any company or organization. We rely on your support to keep the project running. When you support us, you will be listed here as a sponsor so please make sure you provide your name and email address when you donate. Thank you for your support!
sponsors.title: Sponsors

introduction_markdown_editor.title: Welcome to use Reden Markdown Editor!
introduction_markdown_editor.content:
Markdown is an international text format for writing styled texts.
Reden provides you with a Markdown editor, where you can edit on the left side and preview the rendered content on the right side.
If you want to learn more about Markdown, Click Here.
